footer.description: A passionate frontend developer creating modern web experiences.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I'm Ehsan Jalilvand, a developer passionate about creating. I entered the programming world during university, starting with C# and SQL Server.
A few years later, I wrote my first software with help from my father, who is a civil engineer - a program specialized for civil engineering tasks.
I've always loved building new things and experimenting; it doesn't matter what it is - an app, an airplane model, or even a soil-free plant pot!
I have a great passion for plants and flowers. So much so that many neighbors ask me about their plant problems.
Alongside work and projects, I live with my lovely wife and have a funny, mischievous dog named Fandogh who is an inseparable part of our home.
I love learning new things, building useful tools, and spending time with family and nature.
